title: GREECE enforcement action against KEAT - Centre for Education & Rehabilitation of the Blind (5,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Greek DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000 on the KEAT - Centre for Education & Rehabilitation of the Blind. A data subject requested footage captured by the controller's video surveillance system. The controller only responded to the request after the DPA intervened, but in an insufficie...
